insight: "Expired License" reports are BuiltByBit billing record mixups, never plugin bugs: the codebase contains no license-check or expiry code (verified via grep, only Apache headers match "license"). ChatControl is a one-time payment, not a subscription, so the fix is always manual: tag @kangarko with the user's BuiltByBit username to extend the license on the seller side (precedent: issues #1724, #1847, #3802). Do not diagnose config or code for these.
